idea-plugin.name: Claude Sessions
idea-plugin.description:
Shows exactly what Claude Code changed in a session — never mixed up with your own uncommitted edits.
  • Claude Sessions tool window: browse sessions for the current project as cards (title, date, files changed)
  • Per-file change list with +/- line stats, color-coded new/deleted files
  • Native IDE diff view for any file a session touched
  • Inline gutter markers for the latest session, with per-hunk Rollback
Independent of git — works even on files with no baseline in version control.
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 0.1.0: session cards with titles, per-file diff stats, native diff viewer, inline gutter markers with Rollback for the latest session
